who: field service coordinators managing 10-20 service calls/week
offer: For field service coordinators processing 10-20 service calls/week, inefficient tracking causes billing discrepancies. We automate the compilation of service call logs and billing summaries instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem: Inefficient compilation of service call logs and billing summaries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for field service coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to field service coordinators with a demo video
Participate in community forums for field service tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of service call logs and weekly summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
